comment: Workload seccomp profile for agent and nested containers. Denylist blocking all dangerous syscalls workloads never need: container escape, kernel code execution, kernel exploitation primitives, privilege escalation, keyring, system disruption, hardware I/O, time manipulation, SysV IPC, terminal injection, NUMA, new mount API, device node creation, and obsolete syscalls.

syscalls.comment: Container escape / namespace manipulation. mount/umount: CVE-2022-0492. setns: nsenter escape. open_by_handle_at: Shocker exploit. open_tree/move_mount/fsopen/fsconfig/fsmount/mount_setattr: new mount API (Linux 5.2+), same risk as mount(). mknod/mknodat: device node creation. Workloads never need any of these — only crun does during container creation.
Block clone(CLONE_NEWUSER): user namespace escalation. Other clone flags (CLONE_VM, CLONE_FS, etc.) remain allowed for threads/processes.
clone3 passes flags in struct — seccomp cannot inspect them. ENOSYS so Go forkExec falls back to clone().
Block unshare(CLONE_NEWUSER): user namespace escalation.
Kernel code execution. Module loading and kernel replacement.
eBPF program loading. Kernel exploitation vector (CVE-2021-3490).
Newer kernel APIs (6.5+/6.7+) not yet used by musl/Go. ENOSYS for graceful fallback.
io_uring: massive kernel attack surface. Curing rootkit, 60% of Google kernel bug bounty. ENOSYS so Bun/libuv fall back to epoll.
Use-after-free exploitation primitive (CVE-2022-2602 class). ENOSYS so JVM GC / QEMU fall back.
Performance monitoring. Kernel info leak and exploitation aid.
x86 LDT modification (CVE-2017-6346).
Dirty Pipe (CVE-2022-0847). ENOSYS so Go io.Copy falls back to read/write.
Dirty Pipe (CVE-2022-0847). ENOSYS consistent with splice/tee.
Block MSG_OOB (0x1) on send path: CVE-2025-38236 AF_UNIX use-after-free. No container runtime uses OOB data.
Block MSG_OOB (0x1) on send/sendto: flags is args[3]. CVE-2025-38236.
Block MSG_OOB (0x1) on recv path: CVE-2025-38236 recv-side UAF trigger.
Block MSG_OOB (0x1) on recv/recvfrom: flags is args[3]. CVE-2025-38236.
Kernel profiling info leak. ENOSYS — requires CONFIG_PROFILING.
READ_IMPLIES_EXEC, ASLR disable.
Non-linear page mappings. Deprecated since 3.16. ENOSYS.
Filesystem monitoring. Requires CAP_SYS_ADMIN.
Prevent seccomp filter self-modification.
Privilege escalation. ptrace: process injection (CVE-2016-9962). process_vm_*: cross-process memory. kcmp: info disclosure.
Fileless execution from fd. ENOSYS so glibc posix_spawn falls back to execve. memfd_create + execveat combo still fails.
Kernel keyring: CVE-heavy subsystem (CVE-2016-0728, CVE-2023-6931). ENOSYS — CONFIG_KEYS can be off; programs skip keyring.
System disruption. reboot: host reboot. swap*: DoS/data exposure. acct: host file write. syslog: kernel ring buffer read.
Hardware / raw I/O. Direct port and PCI access.
Time manipulation. Workloads read time, never set it.
SysV IPC: cross-namespace info leak vector. ENOSYS — programs fall back to POSIX shm/sem/mq.
POSIX message queues: CVE-2017-11176 class (mq_notify UAF). ENOSYS — no container workload (npm/pip/cargo/git/node/python/go) uses POSIX MQ. Docker default also blocks these.
Block TIOCSTI (0x5412): terminal keystroke injection (CVE-2017-5226).
Block TIOCLINUX (0x541c): terminal injection (CVE-2023-1523).
Block IOC_WATCH_QUEUE_SET_FILTER (0x40085760): watch_queue OOB heap write (CVE-2022-0995).
Block TIOCSETD (0x5423): TTY line discipline change. Line discipline handlers (N_HDLC, N_GSM, N_PPP) are CVE-dense kernel subsystems (CVE-2023-6546). No container workload changes line disciplines.
Block SIOCATMARK (0x8905): OOB mark check ioctl. Complement to MSG_OOB block (CVE-2025-38236). With MSG_OOB blocked, no OOB mark can exist; closes the ioctl-based read primitive.
NUMA memory migration. Info leak and kernel attack surface.
Obsolete and removed syscalls. ENOSYS — kernel itself returns ENOSYS for these.
Block socket families >= 17. Allows AF_UNIX (1), AF_INET (2), AF_INET6 (10), AF_NETLINK (16). Blocks AF_PACKET, AF_TIPC (CVE-2021-43267), AF_ALG, AF_VSOCK.

Block MAP_GROWSDOWN (0x100): deprecated stack-growth flag. No modern libc (glibc NPTL, musl, Go) uses it. Prevents CVE-2023-3269 (StackRot) class — VMA maple tree corruption via MAP_GROWSDOWN page faults. Also prevents sandbox address-range bypass.
Block prctl(PR_SET_DUMPABLE, >0): prevents re-enabling core dumps after RLIMIT_CORE=0. Core dumps can leak secrets from process memory. PR_SET_DUMPABLE(0) (disable) is still allowed.
Block prctl(PR_SET_PTRACER, 0x59616d61): prevents designating a ptracer to bypass Yama ptrace_scope. Defense-in-depth alongside ptrace seccomp block.
